About

This site is about my creations. It contains my artwork, my craftwork, and my professional design work. It may sometimes have snippets of thought and stories of others. But it mainly serves as a window to my world view.

Who am I?

I am a Systems Design Engineering graduate at the University of Waterloo. I'm looking for a full time Product Design position. I spend my free time playing bass, shooting big bows, creating artwork, hammering silver and steel, and playing video games. I don't think there's a lot so say about who I am, but I do have a few things to show about what I've made.

Alena Delena © 2026
